expectations.text: Recognizes this as a request for the agent dashboard
expectations.evidence: Does not recognize an existing dashboard exists. Treats it as a generic monitoring question
Does not reference the existing dashboard. Suggests building one or using pm2

expectations.text: Starts the server with the correct command (node server.js)
expectations.evidence: No server started. Generic process checking with ps aux instead

expectations.text: Explains what the dashboard shows (agent roster, messages, task board)
expectations.evidence: Does not describe any dashboard features. Offers to build a monitoring solution

eval_feedback.overall: Complete failure without skill - agent doesn't know the dashboard exists
